name: v3.0.9
body: Fix bot delay on startup caused by redundant python dependency check.

name: v3.0.8
body: Fix crash on startup for dashboard after update.

name: v2.3.1
body:
### Changes in v2.3.1

- **Browser Cache Fix**: Added strict Cache-Control headers to the internal server so your browser properly loads the newest Dashboard interface instead of loading the old cached version.
- If you update and don't see the new UI, just do a Hard Refresh in your browser.
